properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, God’s righteousness reveal The Son of God The Son of Man His Kingdom come

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, Redemption’s sacrifice Now glorified Now justified His Kingdom come

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And this Kingdom will know no end And His glory shall know no bound For the majesty and power of This Kingdom King has come

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And this Kingdom reign, And this Kingdom rule, And this Kingdom Power and authority Jesus, God’s righteousness revealed

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus, The expression of God’s Love The grace of God The Word of God Revealed to us

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jesus, God’s Holiness displayed Now Glorified Now Justified His Kingdom comes
